turns.content:
## PLANNING COMPLETE

**Phase 23 — Notification Architecture Fix + Holistic Tool Surface Documentation**

**6 plans in 5 waves, covering 7 requirements**

---

### Wave Structure

| Wave | Plans | Requirements | Autonomous |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **1** (code fix) | `23-01` | P23-01, P23-02 | ✅ yes |
| **2** (surface docs) | `23-02`, `23-03` | P23-03, P23-07 | ✅ yes |
| **3** (skill rewrite) | `23-04`, `23-05` | P23-04, P23-05 | ✅ yes |
| **4** (assessment) | `23-06` | P23-06 | ✅ yes |
| **5** (gatekeeping) | (post-execution) | — | — |

### Plans Created

| Plan | Tasks | Files Touched |
|------|-------|---------------|
| `23-01` — Notification fix (4 tasks) | 4 | notification-handler.ts, session-api.ts, tests |
| `23-02` — Tool surface doc skill (2 tasks) | 2 | hm-l3-tool-surface-documentation (NEW) + refs |
| `23-03` — Injection patterns skill (1 task) | 1 | hm-l3-injection-delivery-patterns (NEW) + refs |
| `23-04` — Skill rewrite (3 tasks) | 3 | 13 hm-* skills (3 sub-waves: 3A/3B/3C) |
| `23-05` — hivemind-power-on rewrite (1 task) | 1 | hivemind-power-on/SKILL.md (236→~150 lines) |
| `23-06` — Tool assessment (1 task) | 1 | Assessment doc in phase directory |

### P0 Fixes Included (in P23-04)

- 6 broken `<files_to_read>` paths in coordinating-loop (`hm-coordinating-loop` → `hm-l2-coordinating-loop`)
- coordinating-loop allowed-tools: +7 missing tools (delegate-task, execute-slash-command, etc.)
- phase-execution: `.opencode/state/` → `.hivemind/` state path fix
- completion-looping: all ralph-loop references removed

### Governance Updates

- ✅ `ROADMAP.md` — Phase 23 now has plan listing
- ✅ `STATE.md` — progress counts updated, next step noted

---

## ▶ Next Up

**Execute Phase 23 — chạy 6 plans qua 5 waves**

`/clear` then:

`/gsd-execute-phase 23`

**Also available:**
- `/gsd-execute-phase 23 --wave 1` — chỉ chạy Wave 1 (code fix) trước
- `/gsd-execute-phase 23 --wave 2` — chỉ chạy Wave 2 (surface docs)
- `/gsd-execute-phase 23 --wave 3` — chỉ chạy Wave 3 (skill rewrite)
